agent_output: {"integration_assessment":{"component_interactions":[{"from":"POST /validate","to":"SmartyStreets API","status":"risk","issue":"No circuit breaker protecting against sustained SmartyStreets outages. 3s timeout exists but repeated failures will still consume threads/connections and cascade latency to callers."},{"from":"/health","to":"SmartyStreets API","status":"risk","issue":"Health check couples service liveness to external dependency reachability. If SmartyStreets has a transient blip, orchestrators (K8s) may restart healthy pods, causing unnecessary churn. Consider separating liveness from readiness probes."}],"contract_compliance":"No validation of SmartyStreets response schema observed. If the external API changes its response shape, the service will fail in opaque ways with no structured error log.","data_flow_integrity":"Input address is not logged and raw API response is not logged. When a customer disputes a validation result, there is zero forensic trail to determine what was sent or what SmartyStreets returned."},"observability_review":{"logging":{"coverage":"gaps","gaps":["No request ID / correlation ID in any log line — impossible to trace a single request across log aggregation","No duration logged for SmartyStreets call — cannot identify slow external calls from logs alone","Input address not logged — cannot reproduce or investigate disputed results","Raw SmartyStreets response not logged (even at DEBUG level) — no forensic trail for misclassifications","No structured logging apparent — free-text lines like 'Validation request received' are hard to query in production log systems"]},"metrics":{"coverage":"minimal — single counter with no dimensional breakdown","gaps":["validation_requests_total lacks a result label (valid/invalid/error) — cannot compute validation success rate or error rate","No latency histogram (e.g. validation_request_duration_seconds) — cannot track p50/p95/p99 of SmartyStreets calls or set SLO-based alerts","No in-flight gauge (validation_requests_in_flight) — cannot detect connection pool exhaustion or thread starvation","No metric for SmartyStreets errors/timeouts specifically — cannot distinguish service bugs from upstream failures"]},"tracing":{"coverage":"missing","gaps":["No distributed tracing spans — if this service is called by other services, there is no way to correlate end-to-end latency","No trace context propagation headers (traceparent/X-B3) observed"]},"debugging_capability":"Poor. An on-call engineer at 3am seeing elevated error rates has: (1) a single counter with no breakdown, (2) log lines with no request ID, no timing, and no input/output data. They cannot determine whether the problem is bad input, SmartyStreets degradation, or a code bug without SSH-ing into the service and adding ad-hoc logging."},"resilience_assessment":{"failure_modes":[{"scenario":"SmartyStreets returns 5xx or is unreachable","handling":"partial","recommendation":"3s timeout exists, but no circuit breaker. Add a circuit breaker (e.g., 50% error rate over 10s window → open for 30s) to fail fast and shed load during sustained outages. Return a clear 503 with retry-after header to callers."},{"scenario":"SmartyStreets latency degrades (responds in 2.5s instead of typical 200ms)","handling":"unhandled","recommendation":"Without a latency histogram, this degradation is invisible until timeouts spike. Add histogram metric and alert when p99 exceeds 1s so the team can react before full timeout."},{"scenario":"SmartyStreets rate-limits the service (429)","handling":"unhandled","recommendation":"No evidence of 429 handling or backoff. Implement exponential backoff with jitter on 429s and expose a metric for rate-limit hits."},{"scenario":"Malformed or unexpected SmartyStreets response body","handling":"unhandled","recommendation":"No schema validation on external response. A changed field name or null value could throw an unhandled exception. Add defensive parsing with structured error logging."},{"scenario":"Burst of validation requests exhausts connection pool","handling":"unhandled","recommendation":"No in-flight request limiting or connection pool metrics. Add a concurrency limiter and in-flight gauge to prevent resource exhaustion."}],"retry_config":"Not mentioned — no retry with backoff on transient SmartyStreets failures. Recommend at most 1 retry with jitter for 5xx/timeout, with total budget under caller's tolerance.","timeout_config":"3s on SmartyStreets call. Acceptable as a starting point, but should be accompanied by a latency histogram to validate this is appropriate. Consider whether callers have their own timeout and ensure this is well under it.","circuit_breakers":"None. This is the single highest-priority gap. Without a circuit breaker, a SmartyStreets outage turns every inbound request into a 3s hang.","graceful_degradation":"None observed. Consider: when SmartyStreets is down, should the service return a 503, or return a 'validation unavailable' soft result so upstream flows can proceed with manual review?"},"operational_readiness":{"deployment_ready":false,"rollback_capable":true,"rollback_plan":"Redeploy previous container image. Acceptable for a stateless service with no database migrations. Ensure image tags are immutable and the previous image is retained in the registry.","monitoring_coverage":"Insufficient. A single undifferentiated counter cannot support alerting on error rate, latency degradation, or upstream failure. Minimum viable monitoring requires: (1) request counter with result label, (2) latency histogram, (3) SmartyStreets error counter.","on_call_documentation":"Not mentioned. At minimum, produce a runbook covering: how to verify SmartyStreets status, how to interpret the health endpoint, how to manually validate an address, and escalation contacts for SmartyStreets account issues.","new_infrastructure_required":{"new_env_vars":[],"new_services":[],"new_queues_topics":[],"config_changes":["Add circuit breaker configuration (thresholds, timeout, half-open policy)","Add retry policy configuration for SmartyStreets calls"],"infra_provisioning":["Prometheus alerting rules for error rate and latency","Grafana dashboard or equivalent for the new metrics"]},"database_safety":{"has_migrations":false,"reversible":false,"data_preserving":false,"large_table_impact":false,"details":"Stateless service with no database. No migration concerns."},"verdict":"NOT READY"},"escalations":[{"type":"missing_observability","issue":"Metrics are insufficient for production monitoring — no latency histogram, no result breakdown, no error-specific counters","reason":"Cannot set SLO-based alerts, cannot detect SmartyStreets degradation vs service bugs, cannot compute error rate. An on-call engineer has no actionable signals. The service is unmonitorable in its current state.","routed_to":"Coach K"},{"type":"missing_observability","issue":"Logging lacks request ID, timing, and input/output context","reason":"Cannot trace individual requests, cannot correlate logs across services, cannot investigate customer disputes about validation results. Debugging in production is effectively blind.","routed_to":"Coach K"}],"confidence":{"level":55,"high_confidence_areas":["Observability gaps are clear and well-defined","Resilience gaps (no circuit breaker, no retry) are straightforward to identify","Rollback strategy is sound for a stateless service"],"low_confidence_areas":["Caller expectations and SLAs are unknown — cannot determine if 3s timeout is appropriate without knowing upstream timeout budgets","SmartyStreets API contract and rate limits not reviewed — resilience recommendations are based on common external API patterns","Deployment topology unknown — cannot assess whether health check coupling will cause pod restart churn without knowing K8s probe configuration"],"assumptions":["Service is stateless with no database","Service runs in a container orchestration environment (K8s or similar)","SmartyStreets is the only external dependency","No other observability tooling (e.g., APM agent) is silently attached at the infrastructure level"]}}
